posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Sydney non-profit meetup!

On both Tuesday 6 and Wednesday 7 February we will welcome a limited number of nonprofits to our Sydney offices for an afternoon meetup and training session to help you get started.We will begin both sessions with a presentation of our free nonprofit plan; including how to apply (if you haven’t already) and all the resources you have available to you.

Then we will explore basic monday.com skills and how they can help your nonprofit with task management and project management.Then for something a little more sophisticated; on Tuesday we will then build together a working donor management solution, while on Wednesday we will focus on volunteer management. In both sessions there will be time for Q&A and support with building your use cases.

Register here.
